creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Osokin,

Please try again with a freshly updated ports tree. Be sure to install
glib11-devel and gtk11-devel in that order. You may need to use
FORCE_PKG_REGISTER or (preferrably) remove both packages first.

If the gimp1 install still fails for you, please follow up with output
from ``ls -ld /var/db/pkg/{glib,gtk}*''.

If the gimp1 install works for you, please let us know as well so that
we can close your PR for you.

Thanks,
Sheldon.
